={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Agency Group <noreply@agencygroup.pt>', to: ['geral@agencygroup.pt'], subject: '📊 Digest Diário Off-Market — ' + $json.date, text: 'DIGEST DIÁRIO — ' + $json.date + '
